_comment: Sample of what the three-layer merge produces for one page: panel-upgrade-vienna-va. This is the RESOLVED output after base + client overlay + city data + client config merge + token substitution. A future agent uses this to understand the data shape the page template receives.

resolved_tokens.license_issuer: Commonwealth of Virginia, Department of Professional and Occupational Regulation
resolved_tokens.review_pitch: Our review base is real, recent, and from Northern Virginia homeowners. We don't ghost-write reviews or recycle them across business directories.
resolved_tokens.final_cta_response_promise: We respond within one business day.

resolved_content_sample.hero_heading: Electrical Panel Upgrade in Vienna, VA
resolved_content_sample.what_it_means_p3_excerpt: Ahmad Shaban is a Virginia-licensed Master Electrician with a maintenance team behind him. Panel upgrades are full-day jobs that involve pulling a permit, coordinating with Dominion Energy to drop the meter...
resolved_content_sample.process_step_3_body_excerpt: We schedule the meter drop with Dominion Energy as part of the project...
resolved_content_sample.faq_q3: Do I need a permit for a panel upgrade in Fairfax County?
resolved_content_sample.faq_q4: Will Dominion Energy need to come out and disconnect power?
resolved_content_sample.cta: Modern panel upgrades in Vienna, VA — permitted, code-compliant, one-day install. We respond within one business day.

neighborhoods: Country Club Hills / Westwood Country Club area

housing_patterns.title: 1950s-1970s split-levels & ranches
housing_patterns.neighborhood_examples: Vienna Woods, Country Club area, neighborhoods near Westwood

housing_patterns.title: 1970s-1990s colonials & traditionals
housing_patterns.neighborhood_examples: Hunter Mill District, Vienna proper, north of Maple Avenue

housing_patterns.title: 2000s-2020s townhomes & newer detached
housing_patterns.neighborhood_examples: Tysons-edge, Wolf Trap area, newer subdivisions

city_data_used.distance_from_hq_phrase: Vienna is 10-15 minutes from our home base in Fairfax

merge_rules.overlay_wins: For any key present in both base and overlay, the overlay value is used
merge_rules.city_tokens_injected: All {city_*}, {county}, {utility_provider} tokens resolve from the city JSON
merge_rules.client_tokens_injected: All {owner_*}, {client_*}, {license_*}, {phone_*}, {review_*} tokens resolve from the client config
merge_rules.neighborhoods_from_city: Neighborhood list and housing-pattern cards come from the city JSON, NOT the service overlay
merge_rules.non_destructive: The base service JSON is never modified — overlays are additive
